mapper.select: select id as id, username as username, password as password, coalesce(display_name, username) as displayName, coalesce(role_key, 'tenant_member') as roleKey, tenant_id as tenantId, coalesce(active, true) as active from auth_users order by username asc

select id as id, username as username, password as password, coalesce(display_name, username) as displayName, coalesce(role_key, 'tenant_member') as roleKey, tenant_id as tenantId, coalesce(active, true) as active from auth_users where id = #{userId}

select id as id, username as username, password as password, coalesce(display_name, username) as displayName, coalesce(role_key, 'tenant_member') as roleKey, tenant_id as tenantId, coalesce(active, true) as active from auth_users where username = #{username}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_users (id, username, password, display_name, role_key, tenant_id, active) values (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{roleKey}, #{tenantId}, #{active}) on conflict (id) do update set username = excluded.username, password = excluded.password, display_name = excluded.display_name, role_key = excluded.role_key, tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, active = excluded.active
mapper.select: select token as token, user_id as userId, username as username, coalesce(display_name, username) as displayName, coalesce(role_key, 'tenant_member') as roleKey, tenant_id as tenantId, created_at as createdAt, expires_at as expiresAt from auth_sessions where token = #{token}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_sessions (token, user_id, username, display_name, role_key, tenant_id, created_at, expires_at) values (#{token}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{displayName}, #{roleKey}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt}) on conflict (token) do update set user_id = excluded.user_id, username = excluded.username, display_name = excluded.display_name, role_key = excluded.role_key, tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, created_at = excluded.created_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at
